name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-71
title: new-feature.py scaffolded contract.md does not match contract.md template_version 2.0.0 structure
description: scripts/new-feature.py lines 121-137 scaffold a free-form contract.md with sections Reads/Writes/Invokes/Inputs/Outputs/Cross-scope-handoff/Versioning. The actual rabbit-cage/docs/spec/contract.md uses a structured machine-first JSON block under a single fenced code block (the 'template_version: 2.0.0' format with provides/reads/invokes/manages/never keys). Newly scaffolded features start with a contract format that diverges from the spec's structured form, then must be hand-converted before passing validate-feature.py. The scaffolder should produce a stub matching the current template_version='2.0.0' JSON structure.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
